subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of the servant whom I loved before the creation of heaven and whom Thou lovest at this hour. Verily, Thou art [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ذکر عبد الذی احببته قبل خلق السماء و تحبنه حینئذ و انک انت
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
